news.headline: Fixture ETF flows remain positive in the sample window
news.summary: Concise fixture summary indicating positive ETF demand in a non-live normalized input example.

historical_evidence.hypothesis: Stablecoin supply expansion often coincides with stronger short-horizon crypto breadth.
historical_evidence.event_definition: Seven-day stablecoin market cap change is positive and breadth improves.
historical_evidence.limitations: Fixture evidence only; not current research output.

historical_evidence.hypothesis: ETF inflow streaks can support BTC beta when macro conditions are neutral.
historical_evidence.event_definition: Three or more positive ETF flow days with neutral DXY context.
historical_evidence.limitations: Partial fixture sample has few observations and should not drive final scoring.

historical_evidence.hypothesis: Options skew could indicate downside hedging pressure.
historical_evidence.event_definition: BTC 25-delta skew exceeds a configured threshold.
historical_evidence.limitations: Options fixture source is unavailable, so no statistical result is stored.
